CustomField.description: Serialized JSON geometry of the Space: { cells: [[c,r],...], seats: [{c,r,agentId}], openings: [{c,r,edge,kind}], dividers: [{c,r,edge}] }. Matches the SpacePlanData model 1:1 so it round-trips without conversion. Name and dir are stored in their own fields; everything else lives here.
CustomField.label: Geometry
